entries.title: A Weathered Notice
pages: By order of the Wardens: let no hand break the seals that ring the old wood.
Should a seal fail, the ground remembers what was buried. Send word to Hearthwynn at once.

entries.title: On the Founding of Hearthwynn
pages: They built here because the road forgot them, and that suited everyone fine.
A quiet town keeps quiet company. Until it doesn't.
